title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Franky, Zoro, Unknown person #5, Five Elders, Unknown person #6 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that sound just now?! It startled me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't worry, this is more than enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be able to reach the sea, no problem!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, the only issue is we'll be landing right on top of a fleet of ships!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can blast off at a moment's notice!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Great, but Jinbe's still not here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wound up chasing after a strange monster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time for detours!! Get over here now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not taking a detour!! The monster's heading right for you!! Look sharp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's something special about his presence!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
